features: Brighten up your skin - With our Face Facts Vitamin C Face Cream to boost moisture + give skin its glow back!
Hero active here is antioxidant-rich Vitamin C - Which helps to hydrate + brighten skin.
Lightweight facial moisturiser - That sinks in effortlessly but still leaving skin supple + soft.
Perfect skin prep - Use before applying makeup for a fresh healthy glow.
Creamy little cream - Glides on and soaks in quickly.
description: Product Description Brighten up your skin with our face cream which sinks in effortlessly leaving your skin soft and supple. The hero active here is antioxidant-rich vitamin C, which helps to both hydrate + brighten your skin. Our fresh, lightweight moisturiser takes the hard work out of a healthier-looking glow! Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate, Steareth-20, Ceteareth-6, DMDM Hydantoin, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Parfum, Polyacrylamide, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool. Directions Use after exfoliating, cleansing & toning the skin. Massage onto for 30 seconds, using AM & PM alongside the Face Facts Vitamin C collection to complete your skincare routine. Safety Warning Do not apply on irritated or damaged skin. Protect from direct sunlight. Store in a cool, dry place. See more
